content.claim: A single CEU thesis analyzing Assessment of Basic Competences panel data found zero tertiary education effect of track selection, suggesting the policy's stated purpose of preparing selected students for higher education is empirically doubtful.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Portuguese system reform lens
limitations: Single unpublished thesis with findings not replicated in other literature cited
Long-term effects on tertiary outcomes could not be conclusively established per thesis authors
Does not exclude unmeasured confounding variables affecting university access
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
